questions.question:
Configuration for a Deployment in namespace `config-lab` is broken.

A Deployment named `report-viewer` already exists and should load:
- `APP_MODE` from ConfigMap `report-config` key `APP_MODE`
- `REPORT_USER` from Secret `report-credentials` key `username`
- `REPORT_PASS` from Secret `report-credentials` key `password`

Fix the workload so the Deployment becomes Available again.

Do not hardcode the Secret-backed values into the Pod spec. Keep the configuration externalized through the existing ConfigMap and Secret objects.

verification.description: Deployment references the intended ConfigMap and Secret keys
report-viewer becomes Available and consumes the expected configuration values
Secret-backed values remain externalized instead of being hardcoded

questions.question:
Autoscaling for an API Deployment in namespace `autoscale-lab` is misconfigured.

A Deployment `worker-api` and a HorizontalPodAutoscaler `worker-api-hpa` already exist. Repair the autoscaling configuration so that:
- the HPA targets Deployment `worker-api`
- `minReplicas` is `2`
- `maxReplicas` is `5`
- CPU utilization target is `60`
- the `api` container in Deployment `worker-api` has a CPU request of `200m`
- the repaired HPA manifest is saved to `/tmp/exam/q302/worker-api-hpa.yaml`

Do not recreate the Deployment unless it is strictly required.

verification.description: HPA targets the intended Deployment and uses the required replica bounds
CPU autoscaling target and workload CPU request are configured correctly
The repaired HPA manifest is saved to the expected file

questions.question:
A node reserved for queue processing was left in maintenance mode.

Namespace `node-lab` contains a Deployment `queue-consumer` pinned to nodes labeled `maintenance-lab=target`. The target node is currently unschedulable, so the workload is not running.

Return the labeled node to service so that `queue-consumer` becomes Running on the intended node pool.

Also save the output of `kubectl get node <target-node> -o wide` to `/tmp/exam/q303/node-status.txt`. Discover the target node by label; do not remove the label and do not retarget the Deployment to a different node.

verification.description: The maintenance target node is Ready and schedulable again
queue-consumer is Running on the labeled maintenance target node
A node status report is saved for the recovered target node
